programme.sub-title: Shubh TV is another devotional channel under the umbrella of Sanskar TV group that takes great pride in spreading the spirituality among people around the world. lt programms devotional content such as Bhajans, Kirtans, Aartis, Aaradhanas and Spiritual discourses by prominent Gurus and respected Saints of India.
